category_sources: source_facts.description says library for communication with dive computers; official About page describes a cross-platform open source library for communication with dive computers.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is libdivecomputer; official website and GitHub repository use libdivecomputer.
docs_sources: Official libdivecomputer Documentation page provides manual, compiling, drivers, and technical documentation sections.
repo_sources: Official libdivecomputer Download page says latest source code can be obtained with git clone https://github.com/libdivecomputer/libdivecomputer.git.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and executable dctool; official About page lists supported dive computer manufacturers, platforms, and transports.
